settings.content: All orders are processed within 1-2 Business Days after payment confirmation. Business days are Monday to Saturday - 10:00AM to 07:00PM (IST), excluding public holidays.

settings.heading: Order Shipping
settings.content:
Most of our products are made to order, crafted individually with careful attention to detail.

  • Once an order is placed, production begins and requires a minimum of 3 weeks to complete.
  • Shipping timelines will be shared after production is finished, based on your delivery location.
  • Since items are custom-made, cancellations or changes are not permitted once production has started.
  • You will receive regular updates on your order status, including tracking details once your product is dispatched.

settings.heading: Business Hours
settings.content: Our operational hours are Monday to Saturday, from 10:00AM to 07:00PM. Orders placed outside business hours or on holidays will be processed on the next working day.

settings.heading: Additional Information
settings.content:
Once your order is shipped, you will receive a tracking number via email. Please allow up to 24 hours for the tracking information to update.

For any shipping-related queries, contact us at hello@naarkk.com.
